projects.title: Digiweb
projects.description: An online digital selling platform that also handles commissions.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Developed a web-based library management system as a Grade 12 research project at LUNHS. The system was designed to improve book tracking, borrowing and returning transactions, and the management of library records.

certifications.title: Best in Animation
certifications.description: Selected as the Yearbook Team Leader at LUNHS and received the Best in Animation award for leading the team in creating animated visual content for the school yearbook.

education.title: Web Development 1
education.description: Studying core front-end technologies, including semantic HTML, responsive CSS design, and JavaScript DOM manipulation.

education.title: On The Job Training
education.description: During my 10-day OJT at Gotech, I worked as a Graphic Designer, Organizer, and Salesman. I created promotional graphics, organized products and workspaces, and assisted customers with their inquiries and purchases. This experience improved my creativity, communication, teamwork, and customer service skills while giving me practical workplace experience.
